title: Pixie Plugin Configuration
description: Schema for configuring a Pixie plugin that exports observability data from Pixie at scheduled intervals to external systems. Plugins pair PxL export scripts with a retention plugin backend such as an OpenTelemetry collector or Grafana datasource.

plugin_id.description: Unique identifier of the plugin to configure, such as 'grafana' or 'open-telemetry'.

enabled.description: Whether the plugin is enabled for this cluster.

version.description: Version of the plugin to use.

config_json.description: JSON-encoded plugin-specific configuration. Contents vary by plugin type. For OpenTelemetry, this includes the collector endpoint; for Grafana, the datasource URL.

customExportURL.description: Custom URL for exporting data when using a self-hosted or custom endpoint.

insecureTLS.description: If true, TLS certificate validation is skipped when connecting to the export endpoint. Not recommended for production.

retention_scripts.description: List of PxL retention script configurations defining what data to export and at what frequency.

RetentionScript.description: Configuration for a PxL script that periodically exports Pixie telemetry data to the plugin backend.

id.description: Unique identifier of the retention script.

script_name.description: Human-readable name of the retention script.

description.description: Description of what data this script exports.

script.description: PxL source code for the export script. The script should use px.export() to send data to the configured plugin endpoint rather than px.display().

frequency_s.description: How often the script is executed in seconds. Controls the export cadence for this data stream.

enabled.description: Whether this retention script is active and exporting data.

cluster_ids.description: List of cluster IDs to run this script on. If empty, the script runs on all clusters.

plugin_id.description: Identifier of the plugin this script exports data to.

export_url.description: Endpoint URL where the script sends exported data.

custom_export_url.description: Override export URL for this specific script.

is_preset.description: If true, this script is a built-in preset provided by the plugin, not a user-defined script.

OpenTelemetryConfig.description: Configuration for the OpenTelemetry export plugin.

endpoint.description: OTLP gRPC or HTTP endpoint for sending telemetry data.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include with export requests, such as authentication tokens.

insecure.description: If true, sends data over an unencrypted connection.

GrafanaConfig.description: Configuration for the Grafana plugin that exposes Pixie data as a Grafana datasource.

grafana_url.description: URL of the Grafana instance to connect to.

grafana_api_key.description: Grafana API key with datasource write permission.

retention_scripts.description: Exports HTTP request metrics to OpenTelemetry collector every 60 seconds.
retention_scripts.script:
import px
import pxtrace
# Export HTTP events
df = px.DataFrame(table='http_events', start_time=px.plugin.start_time)
df.service = df.ctx['service']
px.export(df, px.otel.Data(resource=px.otel.Resource(attrs={'service.name': df.service}), data=[px.otel.metric.Gauge(name='http.resp_latency', value=df.resp_latency_ns)]))
